Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: passenger vehicles [300227816], freewheeled vehicles by form or function [300227810], freewheeled vehicles [300227809], land vehicles by form [300215717], land vehicles [300212968], vehicles (transportation) [300219258], Transportation Vehicles (hierarchy name) [300042929], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Self-propelled vehicles designed primarily to transport passengers over ordinary roads.
Úsese para vehículos autopropulsado diseñados, principalmente, para transportar pasajeros a través de carreteras ordinarias.
Te gebruiken voor zichzelf voortstuwende voertuigen die vooral zijn bedoeld voor het transporteren van passagiers over gewone wegen.
Fahrzeug mit Selbstantrieb, hauptsächlich entworfen, um Personen über gewöhnliche Straßen zu transportieren.
Veículos automotores projetados principalmente para transportar passageiros por estradas comuns.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
